ownership_constraints.task_goal: Let the App explicitly send a user-confirmed manual-authentication completion intent to Harbor and render only Harbor's returned public identity state.
non_goals: reading or saving credentials, cookies, tokens, verification codes, profile storage, or raw evidence
submit, publish, send, or other external write
ownership_constraints.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check; loom fact-chain --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite validate --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item APP-236 --json
ownership_constraints.output_format: Controller records the exact branch/head, changed paths, validation results, PR binding, and remaining live-E2E requirement.
ownership_constraints.integration_target: PR #278, merged after Harbor PR #242 because the App consumer depends on Harbor's authorization-protected public endpoint.

ownership_contract.task_goal: Let the App explicitly send a user-confirmed manual-authentication completion intent to Harbor and render only Harbor's returned public identity state.
non_goals: authentication inference or generic identity mutation
credentials, cookies, tokens, verification codes, profile storage, or raw evidence
ownership_contract.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check; Loom fact-chain and suite validation.
ownership_contract.integration_target: Controller-owned PR #278 review, gate, merge, and packaged App E2E.

integration_evidence.summary: The renderer sends a narrow intent through preload and Electron main; only main holds the per-Harbor-child supervisor credential used for the dedicated Harbor endpoint.

The generic owner API cannot call the confirmation endpoint; the IPC validates the renderer and intent, accepts only an allowlisted public response, and refreshes Harbor owner facts without treating page signals as authentication truth.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: APP-236 changes a narrow App consumer and security boundary. Its required coverage is the item-specific specification, plan, implementation contract, evidence map, focused typecheck and smoke; it does not introduce a runtime server or operate a production page.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: The suite proves the local App intent boundary only. It cannot prove a real login synchronization until Harbor #241 is merged and packaged App E2E reads the returned public identity state.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Before each PR metadata or head change and after the Harbor endpoint contract changes.
